parameters.name: allowedAbbreviationLength
parameters.description:
Indicate the number of consecutive capital letters allowed in targeted
identifiers (abbreviations in the classes, interfaces, variables and methods
names, ... ).

parameters.name: allowedAbbreviations
parameters.description:
Specify list of abbreviations that must be skipped for checking.
Abbreviations should be separated by comma.

parameters.name: ignoreFinal
parameters.description: Allow to skip variables with final modifier.

parameters.name: ignoreOverriddenMethods
parameters.description:
Allow to ignore methods tagged with @Override annotation
(that usually mean inherited name).

parameters.name: ignoreStatic
parameters.description: Allow to skip variables with static modifier.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify valid identifiers.

parameters.name: ignoreModifier
parameters.description:
Control whether to ignore checking for the
abstract modifier on classes that match the
name.

parameters.name: ignoreName
parameters.description:
Control whether to ignore checking the name. Realistically
only useful if using the check to identify that match name
and do not have the abstract modifier.

parameters.name: allowSamelineMultipleAnnotations
parameters.description: Allow annotation(s) to be located on the same line as target element.

parameters.name: allowSamelineParameterizedAnnotation
parameters.description:
Allow one and only parameterized annotation to be located on the same line as
target element.

parameters.name: allowSamelineSingleParameterlessAnnotation
parameters.description:
Allow single parameterless annotation to be located on the same line as
target element.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: closingParens
parameters.description: Define the policy for ending parenthesis.

parameters.name: elementStyle
parameters.description: Define the annotation element styles.

parameters.name: trailingArrayComma
parameters.description: Define the policy for trailing comma in arrays.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of lines allowed.

parameters.name: javaStyle
parameters.description: Control whether to enforce Java style (true) or C style (false).

parameters.name: tagOrder
parameters.description: Specify the order by tags.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Specify the list of targets to check at-clauses.

parameters.name: violateExecutionOnNonTightHtml
parameters.description:
If turned on, will print violations if the Javadoc being examined by this check
violates the tight html rules defined at
Tight-HTML Rules.

parameters.name: allowByTailComment
parameters.description: Allow use escapes if trail comment is present.

parameters.name: allowEscapesForControlCharacters
parameters.description: Allow use escapes for non-printable, control characters.

parameters.name: allowIfAllCharactersEscaped
parameters.description: Allow if all characters in literal are escaped.

parameters.name: allowNonPrintableEscapes
parameters.description: Allow use escapes for non-printable, whitespace characters.

parameters.name: allowInSwitchCase
parameters.description: Allow nested blocks if they are the only child of a switch case.

parameters.name: allowClassImports
parameters.description:
Control whether to allow starred class imports like
import java.util.*;.

parameters.name: allowStaticMemberImports
parameters.description:
Control whether to allow starred static member imports like
import static org.junit.Assert.*;.

parameters.name: excludes
parameters.description: Specify packages where star imports are allowed.

parameters.description: excludes

parameters.name: max
parameters.description:
Specify the maximum number of boolean operations allowed in one
expression.

Control whether to enforce that static is explicitly coded

parameters.name: violateImpliedStaticOnNestedInterface
parameters.description:
Control whether to enforce that static is explicitly coded
on nested interfaces in classes.

parameters.description:
Force grouping alphabetically, in

ASCII sort order.

to include methods that return the class' instance.

parameters.description:
control whether string comparison should be case sensitive or not.
Case sensitive sorting is in
ASCII sort order.
It affects both type imports and static imports.

parameters.description: groups

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: specify policy on the relative order between type imports and static imports.

parameters.name: ordered
parameters.description:
control whether type imports within each group should be sorted.
It doesn't affect sorting for static imports.

parameters.name: separated
parameters.description:
control whether type import groups should be separated by, at least, one
blank line or comment and aren't separated internally.
It doesn't affect separations for static imports.

parameters.name: separatedStaticGroups

parameters.name: sortStaticImportsAlphabetically

control whether static imports located at top or
bottom are sorted within the group.

parameters.description: Specify how far an array initialisation should be indented when on next line.

parameters.name: basicOffset
parameters.description: Specify how far new indentation level should be indented when on the next line.

parameters.name: braceAdjustment
parameters.description: Specify how far a braces should be indented when on the next line.

parameters.name: caseIndent
parameters.description: Specify how far a case label should be indented when on next line.

parameters.name: forceStrictCondition
parameters.description: forceStrictCondition

parameters.name: lineWrappingIndentation
parameters.description: Specify how far continuation line should be indented when line-wrapping is present.

parameters.name: throwsIndent
parameters.description: Specify how far a throws clause should be indented when on next line.

parameters.name: allowMarkerInterfaces
parameters.description:
Control whether marker interfaces like Serializable are

parameters.description:

Control whether to enforce that final is explicitly coded
on interface fields.

parameters.name: violateImpliedPublicField

Control whether to enforce that public is explicitly coded
on interface fields.

parameters.name: violateImpliedPublicMethod
parameters.description:
Control whether to enforce that public is explicitly coded
on interface methods.

parameters.name: violateImpliedPublicNested
parameters.description:
Control whether to enforce that public is explicitly coded
on interface nested types.

parameters.name: violateImpliedStaticField
parameters.description:
Control whether to enforce that static is explicitly coded
on interface fields.

parameters.name: violateImpliedStaticNested
parameters.description:
Control whether to enforce that static is explicitly coded

parameters.name: allowMissingThrowsTags
parameters.description:
whether to ignore violations when a method declares

in the javadoc.

parameters.name: allowThrowsTagsForSubclasses
parameters.description:
whether to allow documented exceptions that

parameters.name: minimum
parameters.description: Specify the minimum number of matches required in each file.

parameters.name: fileExtensions
parameters.description:
Specify the file type extension of files to process. If this is specified, then
only files that match these types are examined with the other patterns.

parameters.name: fileNamePattern
parameters.description: Specify the regular expression to match the file name against.

parameters.name: folderPattern
parameters.description: Specify the regular expression to match the folder path against.

parameters.name: ignoreFileNameExtensions
parameters.description: Control whether to ignore the file extension for the file name match.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
Control whether to look for a match or mis-match on the file name, if the
fileNamePattern is supplied, otherwise it is applied on the folderPattern.

parameters.name: fileExtensions
parameters.description: Specify the file type extension of files to process.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify the format of the regular expression to match.

parameters.name: ignoreCase
parameters.description: Control whether to ignore case when searching.

parameters.name: maximum
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of matches required in each file.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description:
Specify the message which is used to notify about violations,
if empty then default (hard-coded) message is used.

parameters.name: minimum
parameters.description: Specify the minimum number of matches required in each file.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify the format of the regular expression to match.

parameters.name: ignoreCase
parameters.description: Control whether to ignore case when searching.

parameters.name: ignoreComments
parameters.description: Control whether to ignore text in comments when searching.

parameters.name: maximum
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of matches required in each file.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description:
Specify the message which is used to notify about violations,
if empty then default (hard-coded) message is used.

parameters.name: minimum
parameters.description: Specify the minimum number of matches required in each file.

parameters.name: checkFields
parameters.description: Control whether to check references to fields.

parameters.name: checkMethods
parameters.description: Control whether to check references to methods.

parameters.name: validateOnlyOverlapping
parameters.description: Control whether to check only overlapping by variables or arguments.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify method names to ignore.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Specify maximum allowed number of return statements in non-void methods/lambdas.

parameters.name: maxForVoid
parameters.description:
Specify maximum allowed number of return statements in void
methods/constructors/lambdas.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Specify the policy on placement of a right curly brace ('}').

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Specify policy on how to wrap lines.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: ignoreInlineTags
parameters.description: whether inline tags must be ignored.

parameters.name: ignoredTags
parameters.description: allows to specify at-clauses which are ignored by the check.

parameters.name: violateExecutionOnNonTightHtml
parameters.description:
If turned on, will print violations if the Javadoc being examined by this check
violates the tight html rules defined at
Tight-HTML Rules.

parameters.name: validateComments
parameters.description: Control whether to validate whitespaces surrounding comments.

parameters.name: applyToPackage
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to package-private member.

parameters.name: applyToPrivate
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to private member.

parameters.name: applyToProtected
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to protected member.

parameters.name: applyToPublic
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to public member.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specifies valid identifiers.

parameters.name: forbiddenSummaryFragments
parameters.description: forbidden summary fragments

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: period symbol at the end of first javadoc sentence

parameters.name: violateExecutionOnNonTightHtml
parameters.description:
If turned on, will print violations if the Javadoc being examined by this check
violates the tight html rules defined at
Tight-HTML Rules.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Specify the RegExp to match against warnings. Any warning
being suppressed matching this pattern will be flagged.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: aliasList
parameters.description:
Specify aliases for check names that can be used in code within
SuppressWarnings.

parameters.name: ignorePrivateMethods
parameters.description: Allow private methods to be ignored.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Specify maximum allowed number of throws statements.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify pattern to match comments against.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify pattern for strings allowed before the comment.

parameters.name: legalComment
parameters.description:
Define pattern for text allowed in trailing comments. (This
pattern will not be applied to multiline comments and the text of the
comment will be trimmed before matching.)

parameters.name: baseName
parameters.description:
Specify

Base name of resource bundles which contain message resources. It helps
the check to distinguish config and localization resources.

parameters.name: fileExtensions
parameters.description: fileExtensions

parameters.name: requiredTranslations
parameters.description: Specify language codes of required translations which must exist in project.

parameters.name: applyToPackage
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to package-private member.

parameters.name: applyToPrivate
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to private member.

parameters.name: applyToProtected
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to protected member.

parameters.name: applyToPublic
parameters.description: Controls whether to apply the check to public member.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specifies valid identifiers.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: Specify policy on how to pad parentheses.

parameters.name: excludedClasses
parameters.description:
Specify pattern for qualified names of classes which are allowed
to have a main method.

parameters.description: Specify file type extension of the files to check.

parameters.name: allowWhenNoBraceAfterSemicolon
parameters.description: Allow unnecessary semicolon if closing paren is not on the same line.

parameters.name: processJavadoc
parameters.description: Control whether to process Javadoc comments.

parameters.name: allowedDistance
parameters.description:
Specify distance between declaration of variable and its first usage.
Values should be greater than 0.

parameters.name: ignoreFinal
parameters.description: Allow to ignore variables with a 'final' modifier.

parameters.name: ignoreVariablePattern
parameters.description: Define RegExp to ignore distance calculation for variables listed in this pattern.

parameters.name: validateBetweenScopes
parameters.description:
Allow to calculate the distance between declaration of variable and its
first usage in the different scopes.

parameters.name: allowPublicFinalFields
parameters.description: Allow final fields to be declared as public.

parameters.name: allowPublicImmutableFields
parameters.description: Allow immutable fields to be declared as public if defined in final class.

parameters.name: ignoreAnnotationCanonicalNames
parameters.description:
Specify the list of annotations canonical names which ignore variables in
consideration.

parameters.name: immutableClassCanonicalNames
parameters.description: Specify immutable classes canonical names.

parameters.name: packageAllowed
parameters.description: Control whether package visible members are allowed.

parameters.name: protectedAllowed
parameters.description: Control whether protected members are allowed.

parameters.name: publicMemberPattern
parameters.description: Specify pattern for public members that should be ignored.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: tokens to check

parameters.name: allowEmptyCatches
parameters.description: Allow empty catch bodies.

parameters.name: allowEmptyConstructors
parameters.description: Allow empty constructor bodies.

parameters.name: allowEmptyLambdas
parameters.description: Allow empty lambda bodies.

parameters.name: allowEmptyLoops
parameters.description: Allow empty loop bodies.

parameters.name: allowEmptyMethods
parameters.description: Allow empty method bodies.

parameters.name: allowEmptyTypes
parameters.description: Allow empty class, interface and enum bodies.

parameters.name: ignoreEnhancedForColon
parameters.description:
Ignore whitespace around colon in

enhanced for loop.
